profileBuilderHint: Build your career profile with structured sections for portfolio and job matching.
profileBasicsHint: Set your public profile details and portfolio visibility settings.
skillsHint: Add your technical and soft skills.
projectsHint: Showcase projects that demonstrate your capabilities.
experienceHint: Add internships, jobs, and relevant roles.
documentsHint: Store document metadata for resume, certificates, and proof files.
profileAuthRequired: Please sign in to manage your profile.
profileValidationExperience: Company and job title are required.
profileValidationDocument: Document name and URL are required.
profileSupabaseMissing: Supabase is not configured. Add environment variables to continue.
profileValidationUsername: Username must be 3-30 chars using lowercase letters, numbers, dot, or underscore.
profileValidationPublicUsername: Set a username before enabling public profile.
portfolioSetUsernameHint: Set a username in Profile Basics to generate a public portfolio URL.
jobsModuleHint: Post jobs, track applications, and manage follow-ups in one place.
emptyJobPosts: You have not posted any jobs yet.
jobPostValidation: Job title, company, and description are required.
jobTrackerValidation: Role title and company are required.
jobMatchingHint: Compare your profile skills with a job description to see fit and improvement areas.
pasteJobDescription: Paste or write a full job description here...
noMatchingResult: Run matching to see score, matched skills, and gaps.
jobMatchingValidation: Please provide a job description for matching.
jobHubHint: Browse approved jobs and filter by role, location, and skills.
jobAlreadyTracked: This job is already in your tracker.
coachHint: Practice interview and viva responses with AI guidance and instant answer evaluation.
emptySessions: No sessions yet. Start by sending your first answer.
coachEmptyChat: Start practicing. Your AI coach will respond with questions and feedback.
coachInputPlaceholder: Write your interview answer or ask for the next question...
emptyEvaluation: Send a response to generate evaluation insights.
coachAiFailed: Failed to get AI response. Please try again.
coachDefaultReply: Please include more specific examples and measurable outcomes in your answer.
voiceHint: Click the microphone button to begin your AI interview. The AI will ask questions and listen to your responses automatically.
voiceUnsupported: Voice API is not supported in this browser.
voicePermissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access.
voiceTranscriptRequired: Please record or type a transcript before sending.
tasksModuleHint: Plan your preparation roadmap, manage tasks, and practice quizzes in one workspace.
emptyRoadmapWeeks: No roadmap weeks yet. Create a roadmap first.
roadmapValidation: Roadmap title and goal are required.
emptyQuiz: No quiz selected. Generate or select one to start.
notificationsHint: Track job updates, reminders, and important system alerts.
adminHint: Review moderation queues and monitor platform activities.
adminAccessDenied: You do not have admin access.
coachLearnHint: Learn career strategy for Bangladesh job categories with a normal AI assistant.
coachLearnEmptyChat: Ask anything about jobs, skills, CVs, or preparation in Bangladesh.
coachLearnInputPlaceholder: Ask a career learning question (example: How should I prepare for a junior software role in Bangladesh?)
enterToSend: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
startTypingToBegin: Start typing to begin your coaching session
technicalModeDescription: Ask technical interview questions and get expert coaching.
behavioralModeDescription: Practice answering behavioral questions with targeted feedback.
hrModeDescription: Get HR interview preparation guidance from an expert coach.
